title: armeria pseudarmeria subsp. carratracensis
intro: Armeria pseudarmeria subsp. carratracensis, also known as the Carratracensis Thrift or Sea Thrift, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carnation family (Plumbaginaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Armeria pseudarmeria subsp. carratracensis include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce inflammation, and promote tissue repair. Armeria pseudarmeria subsp. carratracensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to support skin health and wound healing.
